title: Animated+
description: Add some dynamic in your Minecraft World!
body:
![Animated+Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d21f96e62ebb8a31e247c1f04c0086e70f0be773.png)

Add some **dynamic** in your Minecraft World!

![Animated+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OoSvI3in/images/f9202ac7d07459d63faed59d7ae9cd82f0367c4c.webp)

This resource pack also adds glowing textures to all animated blocks.
To see it, download the [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) (forge) or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (forge, fabric, neoforge and quilt) mod.![Glowing Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a96860e04dd660850c7b8cbfba40947ecf5e384.png)

# Animated Blocks
- All copper bulbs
- Beacon
- Redstone lamp
- Crying obsidian
- Activated end portal frame
